title: adenostegia mollis
intro: Adenostegia mollis is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Asteraceae and commonly known as the New Zealand broom or broom tree. The medicinal properties of Adenostegia mollis are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Adenostegia mollis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
